reference: I would like to know first whether you have any symptoms or not. As you mentioned gallbladder wall thickening, I want to know the size of the thickness. If you are having abdominal pain with gallbladder thickness more than four millimeters, it is suggestive of acute cholecystitis, which requires surgery.
text: I would like to know first whether you have any symptoms or not. As you mentioned gallbladder wall thickening, I want to know the size of the thickness. If you are having abdominal pain with gallbladder thickness more than four millimeters, it is suggestive of acute cholecystitis, which requires surgery.
